project_type: Astro 5 static site + React islands + Tailwind v4, deployed on Cloudflare Pages
build_system: npm + Astro build (Vite under the hood). prebuild copies ffmpeg parts.
test_framework: No unit tests. Verification is via `npm run build` (all pages SSG-rendered).
test_command: npm run build (no test suite; build validates all pages compile)
verification_instructions: 1. npm run build (must produce dist/ with no errors). 2. Spot-check generated HTML for correct class names and token references. 3. Verify font loading links in HTML output.
snapshot_or_generated_files: dist/ (gitignored, not checked in). public/ ffmpeg parts are gitignored and regenerated by scripts/copy-ffmpeg.mjs at prebuild.
setup_instructions: npm install (if node_modules missing). node_modules appears present already.
environment_constraints: Full internet access (OPEN_INTERNET). npm registry may have proxy issues; node_modules already present. Engines in src/lib/ are SACRED and must NOT be modified.
contribution_requirements: Small PRs. Never break the mandatory requirements (no upload, no server, no API, no signup, $0). Motto: Your Files Are Nobody's Business. WCAG AA contrast. prefers-reduced-motion respected.
key_patterns: Tailwind v4 CSS-first config via @theme in global.css. Token names become utility classes (bg-canvas, text-ink, etc.). React islands use client:load. Components use Tailwind utility classes exclusively. Google Fonts loaded via <link> in Layout.astro. No dark mode currently.
directory_structure: src/styles/ (global.css with @theme tokens), src/layouts/ (Layout.astro shell), src/components/ (shared Astro+React components), src/pages/ (Astro pages generating static HTML), src/lib/ (conversion engines - DO NOT TOUCH), src/data/ (format/conversion metadata), .kiro/skills/ (brand + design skills)
